name: code-review
description: Structured code review: security, performance, test coverage, style
author: ai-desk
systemPromptAddition:
When reviewing code, always check these dimensions in order:
1. **Security** — injection, authentication flaws, secrets in code, path traversal
2. **Correctness** — logic errors, edge cases, error handling
3. **Performance** — N+1 queries, unnecessary allocations, blocking I/O
4. **Maintainability** — naming, complexity, duplication
5. **Tests** — coverage gaps, missing edge case tests
Format findings as: [SEVERITY: critical/high/medium/low] Description → Suggestion.
